allow: PowerShell($envs = @\("C:\\Users\\qulip\\miniconda3"\) + \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\qulip\\miniconda3\\envs" -Directory\).FullName; foreach \($e in $envs\) { $exe1 = Join-Path $e "Scripts\\yt-dlp.exe"; $exe2 = Join-Path $e "yt-dlp.exe"; $name = if \($e -eq "C:\\Users\\qulip\\miniconda3"\) { "base" } else { Split-Path $e -Leaf }; if \(\(Test-Path $exe1\) -or \(Test-Path $exe2\)\) { Write-Output "YES  $name" } else { Write-Output "no   $name" } })

PowerShell($envs = @\("C:\\Users\\qulip\\miniconda3"\) + \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\qulip\\miniconda3\\envs" -Directory\).FullName; foreach \($e in $envs\) { $name = if \($e -eq "C:\\Users\\qulip\\miniconda3"\) { "base" } else { Split-Path $e -Leaf }; $sp = Join-Path $e "Lib\\site-packages\\yt_dlp"; if \(Test-Path $sp\) { Write-Output "YES  $name  \($sp\)" } else { Write-Output "no   $name" } })
